chapter_action_policy: Update the existing research-agenda chapter because the gap concerns evidence discipline across the whole book rather than a distinct new architecture layer.
boundary_decision_rationale: The item affects source-to-claim bookkeeping and external citation normalization; it should not create a duplicate chapter for each source family.
external_literature_need: direct citation checks for external literature named in source documents
proof_or_test_backlog: source-derived claim requires source note or equivalent ingested-source artifact
evidence_transition_precondition: direct citation metadata checked before external-literature support
accepted Appendix C evidence transition recorded before support promotion
residuals: Appendix C remains claim-level argument support until mappings are recorded
next_action: Create claim-to-source mapping records before support-state promotion.
non_claims: does not claim external-literature normalization is complete
does not promote any source-derived support state
